---
title: "🗓️ Week 7 - Handling geospatial data with **R**"
---

In this week, we will handle **geospatial data** using R. 


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

We'll learn how to use  R libraries to read, query and visualize geospatial data. In particular, we will focus on [*simple features for R*](https://r-spatial.github.io/sf/articles/sf1.html)


## **Practical exercises**:

### [Introduction to simple features in R](https://rpubs.com/ials2un/GB_simple_features)

### [Agricultural data](https://rpubs.com/ials2un/okra_vez_eva)


## Homework

### ** Publish your two notebooks **

🎥 

## 📚 Recommended Reading 

Study [Tutorial de Leaflet en R](https://rpubs.com/Juve_Campos/LeafletTutorial).
